message:
fix(export): Fix escape_markdown order to avoid stray backslashes

The previous code did `escape_markdown(&text).replace('`', "")` which:
1. Escaped backticks to `\``
2. Then removed just the backtick, leaving a stray backslash

Fixed by removing backticks BEFORE escaping:
`escape_markdown(&text.replace('`', ""))`

This ensures the backslash escape is never added for backticks that
will be removed anyway.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
